title: 实现 workflow 引擎模块
description: 创建 workflow/engine.py (WorkflowEngine 状态机), workflow/state.py (WorkflowState), workflow/persistence.py (会话持久化)。WorkflowEngine 实现线性状态机：PARSING → VALIDATING → PLANNING → EXECUTING → VERIFYING → COMPLETING → COMPLETED。

criteria: src/tflow/workflow/engine.py 包含 'class WorkflowEngine' 定义
src/tflow/workflow/state.py 包含 'class WorkflowState' 定义和 WorkflowStatus 枚举
src/tflow/workflow/persistence.py 包含会话持久化方法
python -c 'from tflow.workflow import WorkflowEngine, WorkflowState, WorkflowStatus; print("Workflow imports OK")' 执行成功
WorkflowEngine 状态机支持状态转换：IDLE → PARSING → VALIDATING → PLANNING → EXECUTING → VERIFYING → COMPLETING → COMPLETED
convergence.verification: python -c 'from tflow.workflow import WorkflowEngine, WorkflowState, WorkflowStatus; print("Workflow imports OK")'

files.target: WorkflowState dataclass 和 WorkflowStatus 枚举

implementation: 创建 workflow/__init__.py - 导出 WorkflowEngine, WorkflowState, WorkflowStatus
创建 workflow/state.py - WorkflowStatus 枚举 (IDLE, PARSING, VALIDATING, PLANNING, EXECUTING, VERIFYING, COMPLETING, COMPLETED, FAILED, PAUSED) 和 WorkflowState 数据类
创建 workflow/engine.py - WorkflowEngine 状态机类，实现状态转换逻辑和事件发布
创建 workflow/persistence.py - Workflow 会话持久化，使用 JSONL 存储

commands: python -c 'from tflow.workflow import WorkflowEngine, WorkflowState, WorkflowStatus; print("Workflow OK")'
success_metrics: WorkflowState 可以序列化和反序列化

reference.pattern: 参考 design doc 3.1 节 workflow 模块定义，4.0.1 节状态映射
